description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.8-bullseye Docker image (overridden by python:3.6-bullseye for py36, python:3.7-bullseye for py37, and python:3.8-bullseye for py38), defines a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME storing $XDG_CACHE_HOME/pip/ and $XDG_CACHE_HOME/apt/, and sets the variable XDG_CACHE_HOME to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs the global before_script `ci/apt install -y -qqq --no-install-recommends xvfb ffmpeg libmpv1 libmediainfo0v5 pyqt5-dev-tools x11-utils` and `pip3 install "tox<4"`, then executes `tox -e $CI_JOB_NAME` and uploads coverage.xml and htmlcov/ as a 14‑day artifact named coverage. Also in test add py36, py37, and py38 jobs that use their respective Python images, inherit the same before_script and run `tox -e $CI_JOB_NAME`, plus a test-dist job that runs its own before_script `ci/apt install -y -qqq --no-install-recommends pyqt5-dev-tools` and then `ci/dist_test sdist`, `ci/dist_test bdist`, `ci/dist_test bdist_wheel`. In the deploy stage add a dist job that runs before_script `ci/apt install -y -qqq --no-install-recommends pyqt5-dev-tools asciidoctor make` and `pip3 install -rreqs/requirements-deploy.txt`, then builds packages with `python3 setup.py sdist` and `python3 setup.py bdist_wheel` and uploads them via `twine upload dist/* -u "$PYPI_USER" -p "$PYPI_PASS"`, publishing the dist/ directory as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} only on tags or triggers. Finally add a pages job that installs asciidoctor with `ci/apt install -y -qq --no-install-recommends asciidoctor`, runs `ci/gen-pages`, and publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, running only on master, tags, or triggers.
